calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar May-13-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Beth Kramer for Carlen Carney.

Ms. Kramer reported that she spent a lot of time with the written explanations and is here to answer any additional questions, that the professional rate of $200.00 per hour was for income tax preparation, that she came into the case 3 months prior to the deadline for filing, needed additional people to assist and found it more efficient to use the professionals in the same office. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Lopes. (Not Reported)
